question: Teresa is 59 and her husband Morio is 71 years old. Their daughter, Michiko was born when Morio was 38.  How old was Teresa when she gave birth to Michiko?

- Daughter Michiko was born when Morio was 38
- Question: How old was Teresa when she gave birth to Michiko?

- When Michiko was born, Morio was 38
- So Michiko is currently 71 - 38 = 33 years old
- Teresa is currently 59
- When Michiko was born (33 years ago), Teresa was 59 - 33 = 26 years old

Alternatively:
- Age difference between Morio and Teresa: 71 - 59 = 12 years (Morio is 12 years older)
- When Morio was 38, Teresa was 38 - 12 = 26 years old
